title: CRM Sync Timeout After Connector Upgrade to v2.3.1
description: When trying to sync CRM contacts to the analytics dashboard, the job times out after 120 seconds. No error in logs, but sync status shows failed. This started after upgrading the CRM connector to v2.3.1. Steps to reproduce: Trigger sync from Integration Hub. Related KB article might be about connector timeout settings. Customer impact: release reporting is blocked until the workaround is applied. Please suggest the relevant KB article and update tags; support policy requires customer confirmation before any closure.
